goal: Keep the tri-workspace recovery model lean and lossless by aligning active governance docs to one bootstrap order, the flat OpenMemory runtime, sidecar-only Obsidian behavior, and the installed MCP descriptor set.
last_action: Normalized active repo bootstrap docs, rewrote the repo openmemory rule to the verified flat API, updated the tri-workspace tool workflow to the 9 installed MCP descriptors, and subordinated the conflicting machine-global Obsidian/governance overlays.
